children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subchapter $15,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2007 through 2016, to remain available until expended.

children.heading: Rural water programs assessment
children.label: b Rural water programs assessment
children.text: Of the amounts made available under subsection (a), not more than $1,000,000 may be made available to carry out for each of fiscal years 2007 and 2008.section 2403 of this title

children.heading: Construction costs
children.label: c Construction costs
children.text: No amounts made available under this section shall be used to pay construction costs associated with any rural water supply project.
